response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent alignment to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role explicitly includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP work, directly matching a key requirement. Solid testing/TDD background, multi-language proficiency, and architecture exposure across diverse domains make this a strong fit, with minor gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin specifics.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching primary stack
Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq aligns directly with required AI agent development skill
Strong testing culture - TDD practitioner, ran Selenium/testing workshops, founded Trial test runner and Fluent-Asserts library
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume despite it being a primary stack requirement
Kotlin not listed in skills; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
No clear mention of cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz, and Kubernetes experience limited to GISCollective deployment

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role
